message:
fix: normalizeIdentity falls back to accountID when email is empty

identityFromJWT can return "|accountID|org" when only accountID is
present in JWT claims (no email). The previous normalizeIdentity
extracted everything before the first "|", which yielded an empty
string — silently dropping profiles with valid identities.

Now uses SplitN to try email first, then accountID as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
